# Richard Ardis — richardardis.com

> AI change & adoption lead and brand strategist, Nottingham UK. Co-founder of Woodlark Associates (applied-AI consultancy) with Trent Peek — leads the human side of AI adoption: leadership alignment, team readiness, and the cultural landing that makes AI stick. Previously: twelve years at Global (Group Head → Account Director, London → Managing Director, Capital FM East Midlands); co-founder of We Are Fulfilment (VC-backed 3PL, £4.8m revenue, five institutional rounds, FEBE Growth 100).

## Elsewhere
- Woodlark Associates: https://woodlarkassociates.co.uk
- Gardn (reference build): https://gardn.world — consumer gardening app live on both app stores in 20 markets; its AI-operated back office (30+ governed agent roles under approval queues and audit trails) is the proven-on-ourselves pattern behind Woodlark's work. Built by co-founder Trent Peek; Richard leads the adoption and change side.
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/richardardis
